query:
INSERT INTO scheduleBlocks (planId, blockType, subjectId, title, description, durationMin, sortOrder) VALUES
(1110002, 'morning_warmup', NULL,  'Good morning',            'Slower start. Summer pace. No rush.', 20, 0),
(1110002, 'custom',         NULL,  'Try the placement page',  'Open /placement. Try a few things. Skip is a real button. We are not testing you — we are checking what feels easy and what feels hard so summer is the right shape for you.', 25, 1),
(1110002, 'read_aloud',     30013, 'Reading — your pick',     'Tuck Everlasting OR Michael''s World — your call.', 25, 2),
(1110002, 'adventure',      30014, 'Outdoor / nature',        'Long version. Yard, ducks, creek edge if Mom or Grandma can.', 40, 3),
(1110002, 'choice',         NULL,  'Choice block',            'Whatever you want.', 30, 4),
(1110002, 'catch_up',       NULL,  'Cozy wrap-up',            'Optional. Skip if you are done.', 10, 5);

SELECT dp.date, dp.id AS planId, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(b.id) AS block_count, SUM(b.durationMin) AS total_min
FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date IN ('2026-05-18','2026-05-21','2026-05-22')
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status ORDER BY dp.date;
